---
title: "print"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/ti/src/branch/main/R/methods.R#L158)

# `print()`

Print ti objects

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `x` | A `ti` object. |
| `...` | Unused. Present for S3/S7 compatibility; additional arguments are ignored. |

## Value

ti object

segment object

segment object

## Description

Print ti objects

Print segment objects

Print segment objects
